arts.ttl: Romano provides Mathys Tel update as Man United continue their push and Arsenal phone again
arts.sum: Mathys Tel may still yet leave Bayern Munich this January transfer window, according to Fabrizio Romano. The Italian reporter has conceded that remaining in Germany looks very possible for the teenager – but that two Premier League clubs continue to make their feelings clear. Those two clubs appear to be the bitter rivals Manchester United […] The post Romano provides Mathys Tel update as Man United continue their push and Arsenal phone again appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man City goalkeeper Ederson is ABSENT from Pep Guardiola's squad to face Arsenal
arts.sum: BREAKING NEWS: Manchester City goalkeeper Ederson is reportedly absent from Pep Guardiola's squad to face Arsenal on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Manchester City - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Pep Guardiola drops a big name - and Mikel Arteta makes an unpopular choice
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest live score, team news and updates as Arsenal host Manchester City at the Emirates in blockbuster Premier League clash.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah makes Liverpool title admission and it's bad news for Arsenal and Man City
arts.sum: Key to Liverpool charge this season has been Mohamed Salah, who after Saturday has now hit the 20-goal mark in five of his eight campaigns at Anfield - and he's hopeful of winning another title

arts.ttl: Can Mathys Tel play in the Champions League for Arsenal after 'encouraging' transfer talks
arts.sum: As such, despite Tel having made three appearances for Bayern in the Champions League this season, he could play for Arsenal in the knockouts. However, should he choose Arsenal, the winger would be eligible to play for the Gunners in the knockout stages of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah makes honest Premier League title claim as Liverpool set Arsenal challenge
arts.sum: The Reds beat in-form Bournemouth on Saturday to open a nine-point lead ahead of second-placed Arsenal’s game against Manchester City on Sunday, Salah scoring both goals to move onto 21 for the season in the league. “It feels good to be fair, scoring goals, the team winning, it’s an incredible feeling,” said Salah.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. Man City confirmed XIs: Raya, White, Khusanov, Marmoush decisions made
arts.sum: Arsenal vs. Man City confirmed lineups: David Raya starts for the Gunners as Omar Marmoush is recalled by Pep Guardiola for this afternoon’s Premier League showdown at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Manchester City: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Match at Emirates Stadium kicks off at 4.30pm (GMT) 10 things to look out for this weekend in the top flight Share your thoughts with Rob via email Plenty to discuss here. Ederson is unfit so Stefan Ortega is in goal for City; David Raya has recovered and will be in net for Arsenal. Omar Marmoush is preferred to Kevin De Bruyne. That means Arsenal make a single change from last weekend’s win at Wolves, with Martin Odegaard in for Ethan Nwaneri. Pep Guardiola makes three changes to the team that beat Chelsea 3-1 eight days ago: Ortega for Ederson, John Stones for Abdukodir Khusanov and Savinho for Ilkay Gundogan. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man City can beat every team in Europe - Akanji
arts.sum: Manchester City defender Manuel Akanji says his side can "beat every team in Europe" after qualifying for the Champions League play-off round.
